history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with curly black hair, wearing a black polo shirt and loose-fitting gray jeans, leans against the hood of a sleek black BMW sedan. His hands are casually tucked into his pockets. The car's headlights are on, casting a bright glow. The license plate is visible and reads "INC" in white letters on a blue background. The scene is set outdoors on a grassy area with trees and lush green foliage in the background. The sky is overcast with heavy, gray clouds. The overall mood is cool and relaxed, with a focus on the man and his car. The lighting is soft and diffused due to the cloudy sky, creating a slightly muted color palette with dominant blacks, grays, and greens. The style is modern and lifestyle-oriented. --ar 16:9 --style raw
